item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested N+1 sorting-table confirmer, explicitly names the prior downstream manual gates (manual recheck, interception, spot check), frames them as a repeated failure pattern, moves the action upstream to the first failing process/data/owner breakpoint, and calls for a structural repair decision. It does not provide an implementable new manual verification gate."}
